sections.paragraph:
f. (for רִבֹּות, the letter ת being cast away, Syr. ܪܶܒܘܽ), Jon 4:11 1Ch 29:7 and רִבֹּוא (with the addition of א, Hebr. Gramm. § 25:2, note 3), Ezr 2:64 Neh 7:66, a myriad, i.q. רְבָבָה; but only found in the later writers. Dual רִבֹּותַיִם two myriads, Psa 68:18. Pl. רִבֹּאֹות Dan 11:12 contr. רִבֹּאות Ezr 2:69 and רִבֹּות Neh 7:71.

רבו

Chaldee id. Plur. רִבְוָן (Syr. ܪܶܒܘܢܳ) רִבְבָן myriads, Dan 7:10.
